column1: # Coexistence partition layout for ForkDrift ↔ TRMNL dual-boot.
# See plan-trmnl-coexistence.md for the full rationale.
#   - app0/app1 shrink from 6.25 MB to 6.00 MB each (-256 KB each)
#   - new factory partition (256 KB) holds the recovery shim
#   - spiffs grows by 256 KB to absorb the slack
